name: Justice J.B. Pardiwala
bio: Justice Jamshed Burjor Pardiwala is a judge of the Supreme Court of India elevated from the Gujarat High Court. He has expertise in constitutional law, criminal law, and corporate law. He is known for his incisive questioning during oral arguments and his clearly written judgments. Justice Pardiwala has authored significant judgments in areas including demonetisation, NEET paper leak, and criminal procedure reform.
